title: LifecycleStatus
description: Enum contract for the lifecycle status of a record. Reusable enum contract, not a stored data instance — no instances are committed to the repo. Storage-agnostic; other schemas reference `#/$defs/LifecycleStatus`. See docs/GOVERNANCE_STATES.md and docs/STATE_TRANSITIONS.md.

reason.description: Reason for the current lifecycle state (e.g. why superseded/revoked).

set_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the lifecycle state was set.

LifecycleStatus.description: Allowed lifecycle status values. `deleted_reference_only` means the payload is removed and only a governance reference remains.
